title: Generate release metadata from candidate branch final tree
rawUserRequest: 发布 preflight 在 PR 合并后发现：预算/治理文件改变最终归档，旧 finalizer 只能在默认分支生成元数据，导致发布元数据与最终合并树时序冲突。按根因方针，先修正 finalizer，使其在受 Contract 约束的候选分支最终树上生成元数据；不发布 tag/provider release，不跳过计划工单。预算和格式检查必须作为本工单事前门禁，不单独拆预算工单。

declaredIntent.summary: 让 release finalizer 能在候选 Work Item 分支的最终源码树上生成 source-bound release metadata，从流程上消除合并后归档变化导致的发布冻结失效。

outOfScope: Adopter projects and installed runtime repositories
Changing archive encoding or weakening exact source checks

sources.reason: Current finalizer enforces default-branch execution and creates the timing deadlock.
Canonical source/archive validation that must remain fail-closed.
Evidence of the post-merge source-tree mismatch.

riskAssessment.reason: The correction changes only finalizer execution mode and regression coverage; exact source/archive checks remain fail-closed.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized root process correction before publication retry.

preReviewWarnings: Verify candidate-branch source identity, default-branch safety, and unchanged exact archive checks.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The finalizer has an explicit candidate-branch mode that computes metadata from the candidate final tree.
Default-branch mode remains synchronized and fail-closed, and candidate mode cannot publish or tag.
Regression tests cover candidate success, default-branch safety, and malformed canonical release-state failure.
Budget/format gates pass with the measured archiveGrowth reservation in this same functional correction.
The Work Item completes archive, PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and default sync.
guidelines: Candidate metadata generation must remain source-bound to the candidate tree.
Do not weaken exact archive/source checks or perform provider publication from this Work Item.
Budget and formatting checks are hard preflight gates; do not create a budget-only Work Item.

intent.problem: The final metadata PR introduced non-ignored governance policy changes after metadata was generated, so the merged tree no longer matched the frozen source/archive identity.
constraints: Require explicit candidate mode for feature branches.
Keep release metadata export-ignored and provider publication out of scope.
intent.rationale: Generate release metadata only after the candidate branch contains every non-metadata change, eliminating the circular dependency between protected PR delivery and source-bound archive identity.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized root process correction before retrying release publication.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

budgetImpact.reason: Reserve the functional correction archive and measured finalizer/test growth in this same root-cause Work Item.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Candidate mode generates metadata from the candidate branch final tree
Default-branch mode remains synchronized and fail-closed
